title: Zinia's Pastel Paper Weaving
excerpt: Hello everyone! It’s Zinia here and today I want to share with you a really fun and slightly weird layout I created using mainly Amy’s Sunshine & Good Times collection. I don’t know about you but to me “weird” is…
body:
Hello everyone! It’s Zinia here and today I want to share with you a really fun and slightly weird layout I created using mainly Amy’s Sunshine & Good Times collection.

I don’t know about you but to me “weird” is one of the best compliments I ever received. I’ve always been an unusual and colorful kid and I tried to maintain that as much as possible as I was growing up. I can’t claim to be as energetic and brave I was back them but I really wanted to dedicate a page to remind myself how important it is to keep my own kind of weirdness and to always be myself no matter what others may think.

I hope you got inspired to embrace your weird side and create a page about it! Until next time, happy crafting.

Zinia

Blog | Instagram | Twitter | Facebook

Thanks so much for sharing this clever and colorful layout, Zinia! Other Design Team member posts can be found here. Shop Sunshine and Good Times at your local retailer or on Scrapbook.com and Simon Says Stamp.
